items.text: Secured $0.5M to lead AI development within a $3M+ SVP-sponsored AstraZeneca initiative projected to deliver $20M-$50M in annual savings.
Secured and led a Chief Scientist-sponsored AI initiative within a €14M EU research consortium spanning 14 partner institutions across Europe.
Secured $0.5M in follow-on funding by delivering CT tumor segmentation with Dice scores 46% better than benchmark models, exceeding targets by 4-5x.
Translated bottom-up AI vision into executive-sponsored strategic initiatives — an SVP-sponsored program and a Chief Scientist-sponsored program.
Shaped an innovative multimodal AI vision aligned with AstraZeneca's 2030 Gene & Cell Therapy ambitions, later submitted to Gartner by GITC Chennai.
Positioned a newly formed AI team across 7 internal groups and 3 startups by delivering differentiated and strategically valuable AI capabilities.
Refocused AI investments by retiring low-probability initiatives, recovering 6 months of delivery capacity and reducing infrastructure costs.
